title: grewia erythroxyloides
intro: Grewia erythroxyloides, also known as the Yellow Mallow, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Grewia erythroxyloides include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, boost the immune system, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, and its leaves, roots, and fruits are also used separately in traditional medicine.
